title: pip next-available version finder
description: List the versions PyPI advertises for a package (pypi.org JSON API), rank candidates above the current version by PEP 440-style dotted ordering, and dry-run pip installs to find the next version that actually resolves. Honors a locally configured index (PIP_INDEX_URL) — fails fast when it is down, never reroutes.
safety: dry-run resolve only — no site-packages mutation; mock runs are synthetic — zero network, zero subprocess
